---
id: provider-controller-list-for-organization
title: "List providers for an organization"
description: "Returns a list of all providers available to the specified organization, along with any configured custom OAuth scopes, enabled state, and organization-managed credentials where applicable."
sidebar_label: "List providers for an organization"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List providers for an organization"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/organizations/{organizationId}/data_integration_configurations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a list of all providers available to the specified organization, along with any configured custom OAuth scopes, enabled state, and organization-managed credentials where applicable.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
